My goal for this talk was to act as a sort of ambassador from the Silicon Valley AI bubble, speaking candidly to educators about the reality of the AI frontier, where the technology is today, how fast and how far it's likely to go, and why I believe that a mix of excitement and fear is the appropriate mindset with which to approach this technology.
